custom_domain.notes: Custom domains are intentionally not used for the current activation target.

activation_checks.description: Repository Pages publication is expected to run through the canonical GitHub Actions workflow.
Canonical workflow validation completed before Pages artifact upload.
The canonical workflow completed build-pages, deploy-pages, and verify-public-pages successfully.
Governed LLM page and demo documentation checks run in package validation and canonical workflow validation.
Automation handoff guard is installed and declared in package validation plus workflow manifest.
iOS-safe workflow mirror drift is checked by a guard and recorded as patched delta until the mirror matches canonical workflow.
ASRO commitment-candidate guard is included in the canonical workflow and workflow manifest.
The root project page loads without 404.
A representative Docusaurus route loads under the project base URL.
The public status JSON is reachable as a static asset.
The iOS workflow mirror status JSON is reachable as a static asset.
Governed LLM demo overview route loads under the project base URL.
Governed LLM demo verification route loads under the project base URL.
ASRO external framework route loads under the project base URL.
The ontology JSON is reachable as a static asset.
A representative governance proposal JSON is reachable as a static asset.

known_404_causes: Repository Pages source is not set to GitHub Actions.
canonical workflow publication failures can prevent updated Docusaurus pages from reaching GitHub Pages.
Canonical workflow has not run since Docusaurus or docs content changed.
Canonical workflow failed during validation, install, build, Pages upload, deploy, or public verification.
Repository visibility or Pages plan does not allow public Pages for this repository.
Browser is checking the old custom-domain or wrong GitHub.io path.
Docusaurus baseUrl does not match the project path.
current_next_action: Canonical workflow push-triggered deployment and verification should advance or fail closed without assigning manual tasks.
